title: Quickdraw Make & Fill Your Own Christmas Cracker Kit – Pack of 6 Christmas Crackers with Hats, Jokes & Ribbons – DIY Arts & Crafts Activity – 35cm Long – Add Your Own Gifts (Kraft)
features: DIY CHRISTMAS CRACKERS : Create six full-size crackers with this make-your-own kit, designed as a fun festive activity for adults to prepare unique Christmas table decorations and add a handmade touch to seasonal celebrations

ALL-IN-ONE KIT : Each pack includes 6 cracker bodies, 6 colourful tissue paper hats, 6 jokes or mottos, and decorative string ties, providing everything required to assemble a complete set of crackers in a simple step-by-step process

PERSONALISED SURPRISES : The crackers are designed to be filled with your own chosen items such as sweets, miniature gifts, or thoughtful keepsakes, allowing you to add a personal touch and tailor each cracker to the recipient

DURABLE & RECYCLABLE CARD : Crafted from sturdy card that can be recycled after use, these crackers combine strength with sustainability, holding small items securely while helping reduce waste during the festive season

FESTIVE DESIGNS & GENEROUS SIZE : Measuring approximately 35cm in length when assembled, each cracker features assorted seasonal designs that bring colour and charm to your Christmas dinner table setting
📏 Ideal Size: Measuring 34cm in length with a 16cm diameter, each cracker offers a main body length of 8cm for your gifts, creating plenty of room for surprises and delights.
description: Add creativity and personality to your festive season with this Make & Fill Your Own Christmas Cracker Kit . This complete set allows you to assemble six full-size crackers at home, providing an enjoyable activity for adults who want to prepare customised Christmas table decorations. Perfect for dinner parties, festive gatherings, or family celebrations, these crackers offer a traditional way to add both fun and elegance to your seasonal setup. Everything You Need in One Kit Each pack contains 6 cracker bodies made from strong recyclable card, 6 colourful tissue paper hats, 6 jokes or mottos, and decorative string ties. With all essential pieces included, the kit makes it simple to craft your own crackers without the need for additional supplies. Just fold, fill, and tie to complete your handmade designs. Customisable with Your Own Filler Items One of the highlights of this cracker kit is the ability to personalise each one with your own chosen gifts. Whether you select small chocolates, novelty items, or thoughtful trinkets, the option to add a unique surprise inside ensures your crackers are tailored to your guests and suited to the occasion. The freedom to customise makes them a meaningful part of your festive celebrations. Made from Recyclable Card Designed with durability in mind, the cracker bodies are produced from sturdy card that can be recycled after use. This ensures that the crackers not only hold their shape and secure their contents but also provide a more sustainable choice for your festive season. Enjoy traditional Christmas fun while being conscious of waste reduction. Festive Designs and Generous Size When assembled, each cracker measures approximately 35cm long, making them a noticeable feature on any Christmas table. Supplied in assorted festive designs, the crackers bring colour, charm, and seasonal style to your place settings. Their generous size also leaves ample room for your chosen filler items, combining decorative appeal with practicality. Key Features: Set includes 6 cracker bodies, hats, jokes, and ties Designed to be filled with your own chosen gifts Strong recyclable card for durability and sustainability Crackers measure approx. 35cm when assembled Supplied in assorted festive seasonal designs

specifications_table.Included Components: 6 Jokes/Mottos, 6 x Crackers, 6 x Hats, String/Ribbon Ties
